loss_reason: Rounds 11, 12, and 13 were all the identical mistake: we dry-peeked the same ramp angle first every time and got picked by the same AWP on each round. Three straight rounds lost to one held AWP angle because we kept repeating the same dry first-peek.

Three straight losses (rounds 10-12) to the exact same self-inflicted mistake: dry A executes with zero utility. R10 '没扔任何烟和闪, 直接dry进点, 死三个'; R11 '又是dry进点, 全队道具一个没用, 死四个'; R12 '第三次dry, 道具还是全带回家了'. We bought nades and carried them back to spawn instead of throwing them.

Not an economy or firepower issue — the same positioning mistake three rounds straight: in R9, R10, and R11 our lurker went solo into B and got picked off before the round developed (R9 '一个人在B道被抓', R10 '又一个人在B道被抓', R11 '第三次单独被抓'), forcing the team into a 4v5 A execute every time. We keep gifting them a free man.

We lost rounds 14, 15, and 16 to the exact same trap: each round the T side ran an outside fake, our whole team over-rotated down, and A site was left completely empty and taken instantly. Round 14 A went empty and got secured, round 15 the identical outside fake pulled us again with A empty, and round 16 was the third time on the same fake with still nobody on A. This is a rotation-discipline failure, not an economy problem.

Rounds 14, 15, and 16 were all lost on A for the same reason: we planted at the identical forward bomb spot each time. R14 the plant was too far forward and a CT held it straight from default and defused; R15 we replanted the exact same spot and got cleared by the identical CT hold; R16 was the third time on that same plant position and we couldn't hold the retake. They have solved our plant location — this is a positioning problem, not an aim problem.

Not a buy problem — a role/order problem. R13: the bomb carrier entered the site first, was shot instantly, and the bomb dropped in open ground where no one could retrieve it. R14: bomb carrier again entered first, died in the doorway, bomb uncollectible. R15: bomb carrier played entry a third time, died, and the bomb was immediately lost. In all three, the bomb was on our first man through the door, so every entry death equaled a lost bomb.

Not an aim problem — three straight force-buys sank us. R12: 全队被打光, 枪全掉了, 经济归零 (wiped, all weapons dropped, economy zeroed). R13: 强起失败, 又白给五个人 (a force-buy that failed and gave away all five). R14: 连续强起, 一分钱没剩, 对面满装 (another consecutive force-buy left us at zero while they are fully kitted). We must break the force-buy cycle this round instead of forcing a fourth time into their full buy.

Not a skill problem — an economy/discipline problem. R13 the B execute was repelled by held angles and you left four guns on the ground (四把枪没带回来). R14 a half-buy rush A got cleaned up by held angles (被架点清光). R15 you half-bought AGAIN, spent all your money and still lost (钱全花光还是没拿到回合). Three straight force/half-buys fed kit into held angles with nothing to show for it.

Three straight B-site losses to the same read: R13 B was rushed by four with only one defender and no trade ('一个人守没换到'), R14 B rushed again and rotation arrived 3 seconds too late ('补防慢了三秒'), R15 breached a third time with still only one body on site ('还是只有一个人在点'). The T side is free-rushing B because we keep anchoring it solo and rotating slow.

Three specific breakdowns, all feeding kills into held angles: R12 our A execute was walled off by an AWP at the choke and traded 4-for-nothing (白给4人); R13 the eco B-rush ran dry into a double-angle crossfire and got cleaned up; R14 our half-buy slow-mid play let CTs reposition and front-hit us, losing the 1v3. Common thread: we peek/push AWP and crossfire angles without utility to take them away.

We got read on route selection three rounds running: R15 upper-level execute walked into a pre-aimed CT hold and never got onto site (上层执行被CT提前架住, 没进点), then R16 and R17 we ran vents back-to-back with a slow crawl — R16 they heard us and trapped the whole team inside vents (vents慢摸被听到, 全队被堵在里面), and R17 they were already waiting on vents and not one player got out (又走vents, CT早就在等, 一个没出来). It's a predictability problem, not aim.

Rounds 17-19 were all lost the same way: CTs pre-smoked B water so we couldn't see, and we hard-pushed the choke anyway with no entry utility of our own, trading three players one-by-one each round (R17 died three, R18 identical dry push died three, R19 third straight blind rush with no first-contact nades).

Same mistake three rounds running: split economy. R15 we won but two players were still on pistols (钱不平均). R16 those two pistol-only players 一碰就死 on the A execute, turning it into a 3v5. R17 again 穷的人先死 and the two rich players were left to clutch a man-down. With a 5400/5200/3400 vs 900/1100 spread, the two poor players are free frags every round.

Same failure three rounds straight: we lost banana control and got forced off by their utility, opening B. R27 '赛点局, banana丢了控制权, B被打穿', R28 '又是banana, 同样的道具压制, 直接输', R29 'banana第三次丢' — they have a repeatable molly/nade routine down banana and we keep contesting the identical duel with no answer.

No prior rounds exist (score 0-0, recent_rounds empty). This is the opening pistol round, so there is no named failure to correct - causality is moot. The previous plan was rejected only for internal math errors: 5 kevlars were assigned per player (3250) versus a claimed 650. Fixed: each player buys exactly one kevlar at 650, verified feasible against the 800 average via check_budget.

Not a slump — the same error three rounds straight. R12: 'A执行人不够, 被守住' (too few bodies to execute A). R13: '硬打上层, 人数劣势下被清' (hard-pushed upper, cleaned out down a man). R14 most damning: '4v5又硬打, 没有利用道具弥补人数' — hard-pushed again and never used utility to offset the man disadvantage. We keep taking straight 4v5 gunfights.

Rounds 18, 19, and 20 were all lost to the exact same A default execute — the round details explicitly note our A defense was too spread out (站位太散) each time. They've solved us: same A hit, our players scattered, unable to trade or hold crossfires.

Rounds 17, 18, and 19 were all lost the same way on B: the enemy smoked off the choke and we had no molotov to clear their held corner. Round 17 detail — 'B点被烟封住, 我们没有molotov清点, 硬冲死两个' (dry-pushed and traded two). Rounds 18 and 19 repeated the identical spot with the identical missing-molotov mistake.

All three losses (R8-R10) are the same window AWP punishing our mid, not a general issue: R8 we lost mid control and the AWP held window to pick off two players; R9 we slow-pushed mid again and the same AWP tagged our entry from window; R10 we ran an A execute without smoking window and the AWP one-shot our entry fragger. Common cause: window is never smoked before we show in mid.

Rounds 15-17 were all lost to the exact same T banana nade stack: R15 they opened banana with four HE grenades plus a smoke and two of our players were grenade-killed with no trade; R16 the identical nade setup cleared banana again and after losing control they punched through B; R17 under the same utility pressure we abandoned banana outright and handed them free map control. The recurring error is holding forward banana positions and eating pre-thrown HE instead of denying the lane.

Not variance — the same death three rounds straight. R12: Long execute, first man picked by their AWP at the doors with no one refragging (门口第一个被AWP点掉, 没人补枪). R13: ran Long again, same door death, then retreated without a trade. R14: Long dry peek and their AWP got another free kill because we again had no trade. We keep feeding the AWPer a free entry on the identical angle.

Three straight losses through the same door: R15 ramp had only one defender and got run straight through; R16 outside was lost again and ramp re-support came too late, so lower fell with it; R17 we lost outside control entirely and four Ts pushed ramp together unopposed. We are under-manning ramp and rotating too slowly to plug it.

Rounds 11-13 were the same failed B execute into an unhandled donut crossfire: R11 we got stuck in donut and couldn't enter, R12 the donut crossfire was again ignored and we lost two, R13 the third straight donut execute collapsed to the identical crossfire. We ran the same dry play into the same angle three times with zero utility to clear it.

Not a buy issue 	imes an identin setup problem 	but identical loss three rounds straight to an A split via monster + long simultaneously. R14: our two A players got separated and each died in isolated 1v1s. R15: same monster+long split, backup/refrag rotation arrived too slowly. R16: A split again with monster direction completely uncovered 	imes nobody was watching monster.

Rounds 11, 12, and 13 were all lost the exact same way: our first man dry-peeked the same ramp angle and was instantly picked by the same AWP each time — three consecutive free opening kills handed to that AWPer on the identical corner.

Three straight A dry-pushes: Round 10 '没扔任何烟和闪, 直接dry进点, 死三个' (no smoke/flash, dry entry, lost 3), Round 11 '又是dry进点, 全队道具一个没用, 死四个' (dry again, zero utility used, lost 4), Round 12 '第三次dry, 道具还是全带回家了' (third dry A, nades brought home unused). The issue is a utility-usage discipline failure, not the buy itself.

Rounds 9, 10, and 11 were all lost the exact same way: our lurker pushed into B tunnels alone and got picked off every time (「lurker一个人在B道被抓」×3), forcing the team to open each round 4v5 and lose the A execute. It's a repeated solo-lurk mistake, not an economy or aim problem.

Rounds 14, 15 and 16 were all lost the exact same way: T faked Outside noise, our entire team rotated down, and A site was left completely empty ('A点没人') and taken for free three rounds in a row. This is a rotation-discipline failure, not a buy problem.

Same mistake three rounds straight: R14 the A-site plant was too far forward and the CT held it straight from default and defused in our face (下包位置太靠前, 被CT从default直接架住拆掉); R15 we planted the exact same spot again and post-plant got cleaned by the identical CT hold; R16 third time on that same spot we couldn't win the retake/clutch. The CT default already covers that bomb position, so they never have to move to contest the defuse.

We lost rounds 13, 14, and 15 to the exact same mistake: the bomb carrier keeps entering the site first as the entry fragger and dying on contact. R13 — '包手第一个进点，一开枪就死，包掉在开阔地没人敢捡' (carrier entered first, died instantly, bomb dropped in open ground nobody could pick up). R14 — '包手又是第一个进，又死在门口，包又捡不回来' (carrier entered first again, died in the doorway, bomb unrecoverable). R15 — '包手第三次当突破手，死了之后包直接丢了' (carrier was the breacher a third time, died, bomb lost). The bomb is dying with our entry and landing in exposed sightlines.

We lost three straight to a broken-economy death spiral: R12 the team was wiped and dropped all weapons, zeroing the economy (全队被打光, 枪全掉了, 经济归零); R13 a force-buy off that dead economy failed and gave up all five again (强起失败, 又白给五个人); R14 a THIRD consecutive force-buy left us at zero money against a fully-equipped enemy (连续强起, 一分钱没剩, 对面满装). The issue is repeated forcing on no money, not aim.

We are stuck in a half-buy death spiral. R13 we lost a B execute to their hold and left four guns on the ground with no save. R14 the half-buy A rush got picked apart by their anglers. R15 (explicitly) we half-bought AGAIN, spent every dollar, and still didn't take the round ('钱全花光还是没拿到回合'). The repeated semi-buys are draining our bank while feeding them free kills.

Three straight identical losses on B: R13 '四个人快冲, 一个人守没换到' (4-man rush vs a lone defender, no trade), R14 'B又被冲, 补防慢了三秒' (rotation 3 seconds too late), R15 'B第三次被冲穿, 还是只有一个人在点' (third breakthrough, still only one man on site). It's a manpower/setup problem — B is being left solo and farmed.

Not one-off mistakes but the same repeated error: feeding set crossfires with slow/uncoordinated approaches. R12 the A execute was denied by the AWP crossfire and traded 4-for-nothing (白给4人); R13 the eco B rush ran into a double-angle crossfire and got cleaned; R14 the half-buy slow mid got front-pushed by the CT and lost a 1v3 retake.

R15 upper execute walked into a pre-aimed CT hold and never made the site (没进点); R16 we went vents slow, got heard, and the whole team was trapped inside (全队被堵在里面); R17 we ran vents AGAIN and CT was already waiting, nobody got out (一个没出来). The decisive issue is repeating the exact same vents route twice in a row, letting them hard-read us.

Rounds 17-19 were all the same death: B water gets smoked off (round 17 '被烟封住看不见') and we dry-pushed straight into that blind choke three rounds straight with no entry utility — round 19 states it directly '还是没有先手道具'. We lost 3 players each time feeding bodies into a smoke we couldn't see through, not from being outaimed.

Uneven economy caused a repeatable collapse: R15 we won but two players had to do it with pistols leaving money lopsided (钱不平均); R16 on the A execute the two broke players had only pistols, died on first contact and it became a 3v5; R17 again the poor players died first and the two rich players couldn't win the residual clutch. Root cause is under-equipped players dying instantly, not the buy size.

All three losses came from the same lane, not a spread issue: R27 we lost Banana control and B got punched through, R28 identical utility suppression on Banana broke us again, R29 Banana fell a third time — each time we contested Banana dry and got flooded with utility.

No rounds have been played yet — this is the opening pistol round at 0-0 with both teams at $800, so there are no prior losses to cite. The call is about winning the pistol and building an economy lead.

We keep losing man-for-man in a 4v5 with no utility support: R12 'A执行人不够, 被守住' (too few bodies to take the site), R13 '硬打上层, 人数劣势下被清' (straight upper-level gunfights got cleared while down a man), and R14 '没有利用道具弥补人数' (hard push again with zero utility to offset the numbers deficit). The pattern is raw aim duels down a player with no smokes/flashes.

Not a slump — the identical round lost three straight times: R18 A taken by a default execute with our positions too spread out (站位太散); R19 A lost to the same default execute with no adjustment; R20 A punched through a third time by the identical default, still spread out. They found a free A default and we keep feeding it disconnected, solo-spread angles.

Rounds 17, 18, and 19 were all lost the same way on the B execute: the site got smoked off and we had no molotov to burn out the anchor/pit position, so we dry-peeked into it — R17 'B点被烟封住, 我们没有molotov清点, 硬冲死两个' (traded two entries), and R18/R19 were identical ('又没有molotov'/'第三次, 还是没带molotov'), the same unclearable angle three rounds straight. It's a utility problem, not a positioning one.

Not a mechanical issue — the same enemy AWP on window killed us three straight rounds because we exposed ourselves to it uncontested: R8 we lost mid control and he picked off two players at window; R9 we slow-pushed mid again and he tagged our entry at the same window spot; R10 we executed A but never smoked mid first, so he one-shot our entry fragger crossing window.

All three losses came from the T side's banana nade stack: R15 they ran 4 HE + smoke to force banana and killed two of our players with grenades without us trading; R16 the same nade formation cleared banana again and we lost control, then B got broken through; R17 under that same utility pressure we abandoned banana outright and gave them free map control.

Rounds 12-14 were all lost the identical way: our first man dry-peeked the Long doorway into their held AWP angle and got instantly picked, with no teammate positioned to trade. R12 opener dropped in the doorway, no refrag; R13 we ran the same peek and just backed off after losing the opener without a re-peek; R14 was a dry peek with no utility and the AWP got another free frag with zero trade.

Three straight rounds (15-17) were lost the same way: ramp/outside got overrun. R15 ramp had only one defender and was run straight through; R16 outside fell again and the ramp rotation was too slow, giving up Lower; R17 we lost outside control entirely and four Ts pushed ramp uncontested. It's an under-manned ramp getting overwhelmed before help arrives, not an aim issue.

Rounds 11-13 were all lost the same way: we ran the identical B execute through donut and never touched the crossfire with utility. R11 we got stuck and couldn't enter the site (进不去点), R12 we repeated the exact execute and lost two men to the unprocessed crossfire (交叉点没处理), R13 we forced a third time into the same donut crossfire and got collapsed instantly (直接崩). The cause is the uncontested donut crossfire angle, not the site choice.

Rounds 14-16 were all lost to the identical A-site split: attackers hit monster and long simultaneously, cutting our two A defenders into isolated 1v1s. Round 14 both defenders died separated, Round 15 the rotation/backup never arrived in time (补防没到位), and Round 16 nobody was watching monster at all when A got split open.

Rounds 11-13 were all lost the same way: we dry-peeked the identical ramp corner three straight times and our first man (entry) was picked by the same AWPer each round (R11 first peeker AWP'd, R12 same corner same AWP, R13 a third dry peek into the same AWP). We are hand-feeding one AWPer free opening kills by repeating a dry peek into a known hold.

Rounds 10-12 were all lost the same way: dry A executes with zero utility thrown. R10 'A执行没扔任何烟和闪, 直接dry进点, 死三个' (no smoke/flash, lost 3); R11 'A又是dry进点, 全队道具一个没用, 死四个' (team used no util at all, lost 4); R12 'A第三次dry, 道具还是全带回家了' (third dry A, nades carried home unused). We bought utility and never threw it before entering.

Rounds 9, 10, and 11 were all lost the exact same way: our lurker pushed into B tunnels alone (lurker一个人在B道被抓) and got picked off before contact, forcing us to open the site 4v5 every time. Same solo death, same man-disadvantage, three rounds straight — the enemy has our B lurk timing read and is farming it.

Rounds 14, 15, and 16 were all lost to the exact same trick: the Ts ran an outside fake and our whole team rotated down ('全队轮转下去'), leaving A completely empty and taken for free three straight times ('A点空了被秒' / 'A点又空' / 'A点还是没人'). It's a rotation-discipline failure, not a buy or aim problem.

Rounds 14-16 were all lost the same way on A: R14 we planted too far forward and CT held it straight from default and defused; R15 we planted the identical spot and the post-plant positions got cleaned by the same CT hold; R16 was the third plant at that exact point and we couldn't win the resulting clutch/retake. We fed them the same read three rounds running.

Rounds 13-15 were all lost the same way: the bomb carrier was used as the opening/entry man. R13 the carrier pushed in first and died on the first shot, dropping C4 in the open where no one could retrieve it; R14 the carrier again entered first and died in the doorway, bomb unrecoverable; R15 the carrier played breaker a third time, died, and the bomb was lost outright. We keep feeding the C4 into the first gunfight.

Not an aim problem — it's three straight force-buys into a fully-loaded team. R12: 全队被打光, 枪全掉了, 经济归零 (wiped, dropped all guns, economy zeroed). R13: 强起失败, 又白给五个人 (force-buy failed, gave away five kills). R14: 连续强起, 一分钱没剩, 对面满装 (third consecutive force with zero money left while they're fully equipped, 6200 vs our 750). Each force lost more guns and reset us to zero, feeding the spiral.

Three straight force/half-buys against a 5800-avg team. R13: B execute repelled by their defensive rifles and we left 4 rifles on the ground (no weapons recovered). R14: half-buy rush A got cleared by their anglers. R15: another half-buy where we spent all our money and still lost the round.

Same structural B hole three rounds straight, not aim: R13 '4人快冲B, 一个人守没换到' (4-man rush, lone defender, no trade); R14 'B又被冲, 补防慢了三秒' (rotate arrived 3s late); R15 'B第三次被冲穿, 还是只有一个人在点' (still only one player on site). B is under-manned and rotations land after the site is already lost.

All three losses came from entering open sightlines with no smoke to kill the AWP/crossfire, plus poor coordination. R12: A execute got walled off by an AWP crossfire and we handed over 4 free kills (白给4人). R13: eco rush B ran straight into a double-hold crossfire and got cleared (被双架点交叉火力清光). R14: slow mid default let CTs front-peek and break tempo, ending in a lost 1v3 (残局1v3失败).

We got camped for running the same two lanes three rounds straight. R15 the upper execute walked into a pre-aimed CT hold and never made site (上层执行被CT提前架住, 没进点). R16 the slow vents creep got heard and the whole team got trapped inside (vents慢摸被听到, 全队被堵在里面). R17 we ran vents AGAIN, CTs were already waiting, and nobody got out (又走vents, CT早就在等, 一个没出来). Vents and upper are burned and fully read.

Three straight round losses (17-19) were all the identical mistake: the CTs smoked off B water so we had no vision, and we dry-pushed into that smoke blind. R17 we hard-rushed into the smoke and traded away 3 players; R18 we ran the exact same blind water push and lost 3 again; R19 was a third consecutive dry hit with no lead utility of our own ('还是没有先手道具'). We kept charging into their smoke with nothing to clear it.

All three losses share one root cause: uneven economy (round 15 flagged 钱不平均). Round 16 - on the A execute the two broke players had only pistols, died on first contact, and it became a 3v5. Round 17 - again the poor players died first and the two rich players were left unable to win the clutch.

Three straight losses (R27, R28, R29) are the identical failure: we keep losing banana control. R27 'banana lost control, B got cracked open,' R28 'banana again, same utility suppression, straight loss,' R29 'banana lost a third time' dropping us to 14-15. They are winning the banana utility war with molotovs/nades and walking into B unopposed.
None to cite: this is the 0-0 opening pistol round with an empty recent_rounds history, so there is no prior round to analyze and I will not fabricate a failure.
我们连续三局在4v5人数劣势下硬打:R12 A点执行人不够被守住,R13硬打上层被清,R14(据回合详情)又是硬打且没有利用道具弥补人数。核心问题是缺人还打干架、不投道具。

We lost R18-20 to the exact same A default execute three straight rounds: R18 'A点被默认打法拿下, 我们站位太散', R19 'A又被同样的default execute拿下', R20 'A第三次被同一套default打穿, 站位还是散的'. Each time we were too spread out and died isolated to their first contact, letting the identical default crack A open without adaptation.

Rounds 17-19 were three identical B-site losses: the site was smoked off and we had no molotov to burn out the anchor. R17 detail says we dry-pushed the smoke and traded two players (硬冲死两个); R18 and R19 hit the exact same smoke-protected position with still no molotov to clear it (B又没有molotov / B第三次还是没带molotov). It's a missing-utility problem, not a strategy problem.

Three straight rounds lost to the same enemy AWPer on window: R8 we lost mid control and the AWP picked off two players holding window, R9 our slow mid push got the entry re-fragged from the same window angle, and R10 we executed A without smoking window and the AWP one-tapped our entry fragger during the take. We keep feeding the same open window angle.

Three straight banana losses to the same scripted utility open: R15 T threw 4 HE + smoke and our two banana holders died to the nade stack with no trade, losing the man-count; R16 the identical nade barrage cleared banana again and after losing control B got broken through; R17 under the same utility pressure we abandoned banana outright and gave them control for free.

Rounds 12-14 were all lost the same way: repeated Long attacks where the first man through the doors was picked by the Long AWP with no follow-up. R12 '门口第一个人被AWP点掉, 后面没人补枪' (no refrag), R13 same doors pick then '没有换人就撤了' (backed off without trading), R14 'long dry peek, AWP又拿一个, 我们没有trade' (dry peek, no trade). Same AWP angle, single-file entries, zero trade discipline.

All three losses (R15-17) are the same failure: T ramp/outside pressure overrunning an under-defended ramp. R15 ramp had only one defender and got run straight through. R16 outside was lost again and ramp re-support came too late, giving up lower. R17 was a total loss of outside control with a 4-man push flooding ramp unopposed.

Rounds 11-13 were all lost to the exact same untouched B donut crossfire: R11 we got pinned in donut and couldn't enter the site, R12 we again failed to clear the donut crossers and lost two players, R13 we ran the identical B execute a third time straight into the same crossfire and got broken outright. We kept feeding the same angle with no utility to cut it off, and they read it every time.

All three losses (R14, R15, R16) were the identical A execute: opponents split A through monster and long simultaneously. R14 our two A players got cut off and died isolated; R15 the same monster+long split beat our late backup/rotate; R16 monster side had nobody watching it at all. They've solved our A setup and will keep running it until we punish it.

Rounds 11, 12, and 13 were the identical death: our first man dry-peeked the same ramp angle and was picked by the same AWP three rounds in a row (round details confirm identical cause each time). We fed that AWPer free opening kills.

Three straight A executes lost by dry-entering the site with zero utility: R10 pushed A with no smokes or flashes thrown and lost 3; R11 dry A again with the entire team's util unused, lost 4; R12 a third dry A hit with all nades carried home. We aren't losing gunfights, we're walking naked into a set CT crossfire.

Rounds 9, 10, and 11 were all lost the exact same way: our lurker got picked off alone in B tunnels every round (R9 '一个人在B道被抓', R10 '又一个人在B道被抓', R11 '第三次单独被抓'), forcing us to open the site 4v5 each time. We gave up a free man before the fight started three rounds in a row.

Rounds 14, 15 and 16 were all lost to the exact same read: T faked outside, our whole team rotated down, and A went empty and got taken instantly each time (R14: 'A空了被秒', R15: 'A点又空', R16: '第三次中同一个假, A点还是没人'). Same outside bait three straight rounds, and we over-rotated off A every time.

We lost rounds 14, 15, and 16 to the exact same mistake three straight times: R14 we planted A too far forward and CT held from default and defused; R15 we planted the same A spot and got cleaned off the post-plant by the identical CT hold; R16 we hit the same plant a third time and couldn't win the residual clutch. They have our default plant read cold.

Rounds 13-15 were lost the same way three times: the bomb carrier was used as the first entry fragger. R13 - 包手第一个进点, 一开枪就死, bomb dropped in open ground no one dared grab. R14 - 包手又是第一个进, died at the doorway, bomb again unrecoverable. R15 - 包手第三次当突破手, died and the bomb was straight-up lost. It's a role problem, not aim: the bomb carrier keeps opening duels and dying, so every trade also loses the bomb in the open.

Rounds 13-14 were back-to-back failed force-buys: R13 '强起失败, 又白给五个人' (all five died with nothing), R14 '连续强起, 一分钱没剩, 对面满装' — we half-bought into a fully-equipped enemy (them 6200 avg), lost everyone, and reset our own economy to zero. R12 we lost all guns. The concrete cause is repeated force-buying against full-armor rifles, not any single tactical mistake.

Three straight half/force buys against a $5800 CT side: R13 B execute was repelled by their hold and we lost 4 guns we couldn't rebuy; R14 half-buy rush A got cleared by their anchors; R15 was another half-buy where we spent all our money and still lost the round. The pattern is repeated under-buys draining our bank with no conversion.

Three straight B rushes we never solved: R13 '
correct' B
correct — B point rushed by 4, only one anchor with no trade (被四个人快冲, 一个人守没换到); R14 B rushed again with rotation arriving 3 seconds too late (补防慢了三秒); R15 B rushed and broken a third time, still only one player on site (第三次被冲穿, 还是只有一个人在点). Same read every round: B is under-manned and rotations are late.

Three straight losses came from getting caught at range and in set crossfires while under-armed: R12 the A execute was walled off by an AWP (被连狙拒之门外) and fed 4 players into a held long angle; R13 the eco B rush ran into a double-hold crossfire and got cleaned; R14 the half-buy mid slow-peel was broken by a CT front-push and lost 1v3. On top of that a real half-buy isn't affordable — galil+armor+util is 2950 vs our 2400 — so forcing again just repeats the under-armed deaths.

Not a buy problem — a predictability problem. R15 the upper execute walked into a CT pre-holding the angle (上层执行被CT提前架住, 没进点). R16 vents was heard on the slow creep and the whole team got trapped inside (vents慢摸被听到, 全队被堵在里面). R17 we ran vents AGAIN and the CT was already set and waiting, no one got out (又走vents, CT早就在等, 一个没出来). Vents two rounds straight plus upper before that let them hard-read our approach.

Rounds 17-19 were lost the same way: R17 '"B点water被烟封住看不见, 我们硬冲死三个"' — we dry-pushed B water blind into their smoke and lost 3; R18 repeated the identical dry rush into water; R19 was a third dry hit with explicitly no entry utility (没有先手道具). We fed them the same blind peek into a smoke three rounds straight.

R16 and R17 were lost to economic imbalance, not tactics: the spread [5400,5200,1100,900,3400] left two players able to afford only pistols. R16 detail: 'A执行, 穷的两个人只有pistol, 一碰就死, 变成3v5' — they died on first contact during the A execute, turning it into a 3v5. R17 detail: '又是穷的人先死, 富的两个人打不了残局' — same pattern, the poor players died first and the two rich players couldn't win the resulting clutch.

Not variance — the same death three rounds straight. R27: 'banana丢了控制权, B被打穿' (lost banana control, run through B). R28: '又是banana, 同样的道具压制' (lost the banana utility duel again). R29: 'banana第三次丢' (third straight banana loss). They win banana with nades before we can fire, then take B off the map control.
N/A - this is the opening pistol round (score 0-0, recent_rounds is empty), so there are no prior rounds to cite. Call is based purely on pistol-round economy.

We lost R12-14 the same way in a 4v5: R12 we ran an A execute with too few bodies and got held; R13 we hard-pushed upper dry and got cleanly picked a man down; R14 we again hard-pushed with zero utility ('没有利用道具弥补人数'). Root cause: taking straight gunfights a man short instead of using nades to even the odds.

Rounds 18-20 were all lost the exact same way: A was taken by their default execute three straight times (R18 default打法, R19 same default execute, R20 identical default punched through a third time), and every time our A holders were 站位太散 — spread on isolated angles with no crossfire and no utility to break the push, so we got picked one-by-one instead of trading.

Rounds 17-19 were lost to the identical mistake three times in a row at B: the site anchor was held behind a smoke, and we had no molotov to burn him off the position. Round 17 detail 'B点被烟封住, 我们没有molotov清点, 硬冲死两个' — we force-pushed the smoke and lost two players; rounds 18 and 19 repeated it ('B又没有molotov', 'B第三次, 还是没带molotov'), unable to clear the same anchor spot.

Rounds 8-10 were all lost to the same enemy AWPer holding window from mid. R8: we lost mid control and that AWP picked off two of us from window. R9: we slow-pushed mid again and he headshot our entry from the exact same window spot. R10: we ran an A execute but never smoked window ('A执行前中路没封烟'), so the AWP one-tapped our entry fragger. Same angle, same death, three rounds running.

Rounds 15-17 were all lost the same way: T repeatedly force-opened banana with a heavy utility stack (four HE + smoke). R15 caught two of our players in the nade stack and they died without a trade; R16 the identical nade setup cleared banana again and we lost control, getting run through B; R17 we abandoned the point outright under that utility pressure, handing T free map control. Root cause: we keep feeding exposed bodies into a pre-naded banana choke.

Rounds 12-14 were all the same mistake: repeated dry peeks onto long against their AWP with no smoke and no trade. R12 the first man through doors got picked by the AWP and nobody re-peeked to refrag; R13 we hit long again, took the same doors death and simply retreated without trading; R14 we dry-peeked long once more, gave the AWP another free pick, and had zero trade support.

All three losses came through the same outside→ramp funnel: R15 ramp had only one defender and got run straight through after outside fell; R16 outside lost again and ramp re-support arrived too late, giving up lower; R17 outside control was fully lost and four Ts pushed ramp together and steamrolled it. The hole is an under-manned, late ramp defense.

We ran the identical B-donut execute three rounds straight into a pre-set crossfire: R11 we got stuck in donut and couldn't enter, R12 we repeated it without clearing the crossfire and lost two, R13 we forced it a third time and got collapsed on the same donut crossfire. We kept feeding the same angle instead of changing anything.

All three recent rounds were lost to the identical A monster+long split: R14 our two A players got isolated and traded off separately, R15 the backup/rotation was too slow to arrive (补防没到位), and R16 nobody was watching monster at all so the split walked in free.
